title: Interruption applicable to all minerals and modes of use
doc_html:
§40.  Interruption applicable to all minerals and modes of use

An interruption of prescription applies to all types of minerals covered by the act creating the servitude and to all modes of its use.  

Acts 1974, No. 50, §40, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
doc_text:
§40.  Interruption applicable to all minerals and modes of use
An interruption of prescription applies to all types of minerals covered by the act creating the servitude and to all modes of its use.
Acts 1974, No. 50, §40, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
